title: Pool
description: A weekly-window pool clearing intents against a StandingOffer's tier curve (§5.1, §5.3).

state.description: FORMING -> SOFT_LOCK -> HARD_LOCK -> EXECUTING -> VERIFYING/STREAMING -> SETTLED | PARTIAL | FAILED | DISPUTED (§5.1).

members.description: Revealed only at HARD_LOCK, only in-contract (§5.1). Each entry is an OrderLine ($defs) sub-schema.

tier_reached.description: 1-based index into the winning StandingOffer.tier_curve entry.

uniform_price.description: USDC 6-decimal base units, string-encoded integer. Must satisfy uniform_price * (1 + buyer_fee) < bonded_reference_price (§5.3, §6.3).

fee_schedule_pinned.description: Fee schedule version this pool is pinned to forever (params.fees.pinnedPerPool).

policy_version_pinned.description: Policy version this pool is pinned to; upgrades never touch existing pools (§6.8).

intents_root.description: Merkle root of the sealed intent set committed on-chain at window open/close.

transcript_commit.description: Commitment hash of the matcher's clearing transcript.

tee_attestation.description: TEE attestation blob (AWS Nitro; mock attestation on testnet per params.matcher.trust).
